---
title: "Code Example Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec05-sp01"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec05"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this PYTHON example._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.code-example}
**Code in Action**

```python
# Add your code here
```

**Interpretation:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Explain what this code does._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a follow-up prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add instructions for this PYTHON code-along._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.code-along}
**Structured Code-Along**

**Goal:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _State the objective._]

**Steps:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide step-by-step instructions._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Troubleshooting**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance for common errors._]
:::
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Computational and Analytical Learning</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Code Output Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
